steps.t: Raphûz asked you to meet him at Igbâl's home in Jirush. He is to meet the merchant for his role in Ardub's rescue.
When you arrived at Igbâl's home, it appeared that Raphûz was engaged in conversation with the man. Galamê, Igbâl's translator, summoned you to speak …
Galamê asked if you knew Raphûz's intent and suggested he needed to speak with Igbâl. Galamê then suggested you speak with Raphûz.
After speaking with Raphûz, Galamê motioned and called for you to return and speak with him at Igbâl's home in Jirush.
Ashâmi watched with great interest as you spoke with Galamê and Raphûz spoke with her father, Igbâl. She motioned you to come speak with her at her fa…
Ashâmi asked you to dissuade Raphûz from whatever path her father, Igbâl, set him upon. She is concerned that the young man will be slain attempting w…
Raphûz did not want to discuss what Igbâl asked of him at his home. He requested that you return to his camp in Jirush and speak to him there.
